Description:
30 DAY ARTEX ELT FUNCTIONAL CHECK- . Functional Check 1) A monthly functional check is recommended to verify operational status of the ELT.
2) Perform this functional check in accordance with SUBTASK 25-62-10-750-01 on page 33.
Notes:
The aircraft transceiver is not recommended for this test, because it is too sensitive to  verify the integrity of the antenna system and it may pick up a weak signal even if the  antenna is disconnected from the ELT. An AM radio provides a better level of  confidence for this test
CAUTION: DO NOT ALLOW THE DURATION OF THIS TEST TO EXCEED 5 SECONDS. THE ELT  WILL TRANSMIT A 406 MHZ SIGNAL AFTER THE ELT IS ACTIVATED FOR  APPROXIMATELY 47 SECONDS. THE COSPAS-SARSAT SATELLITE SYSTEM WILL  CONSIDER THE 406 MHZ TRANSMISSION TO BE A VALID DISTRESS SIGNAL.

Description: 5 YEAR GARMIN G500H TXi EARTH MAGNETIC FIELD MOD UPDATE OR VERIFY UPDATED IN THE AVIATION DATABASE
Notes:
The AHRS utilize an Earth magnetic field model which is updated once every 5 years as part of the Aviation Database  maintained by the owner/operator. If the magnetic model is  not up-to-date, the unit will issue an alert upon startup indicating the model has expired. A service bulletin containing the updated magnetic field model and instructions for installation can be obtained from the Dealer Resource Center or by contacting Garmin.
